privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Java project with a deliberately introduced NullPointerException bug in the calculateTax method of OrderProcessingService class. The bug occurs when a Customer with a null billing address is processed, causing the line 'String city = order.getCustomer().getBillingAddress().getCity()' to throw NPE. A stack trace file is provided at /home/ga/Desktop/crash_log.txt pointing to this bug. The verification test (com.ecommerce.core.VerificationTest) creates a Customer with null billing address and verifies the fix by ensuring no NPE is thrown during order processing. All project files, directories, and test cases are generated by the setup and verification scripts.
